description.description: Description of the MuonFP fingerprint, including scope, collection context or notes which could help an analyst to reproduce the calculation.

first-seen.description: First time the MuonFP fingerprint has been observed.

ip-dst.description: Destination IP address associated with this MuonFP fingerprint observation.

ip-src.description: Source IP address associated with this MuonFP fingerprint observation.

last-seen.description: Last time the MuonFP fingerprint has been observed.

muonfp-fingerprint.description: MuonFP fingerprint computed from TCP SYN/SYN-ACK packet attributes, expressed as 'TCPWindowSize:TCPOptions:TCPMSS:TCPWindowScale' (e.g. 26847:2-4-8-1-3:1460:8).

reference.description: Reference to the source, tool or report associated with this MuonFP fingerprint.

tcp-mss.description: TCP Maximum Segment Size (MSS) component of the MuonFP fingerprint.

tcp-options.description: Ordered list of TCP option KIND values used in the MuonFP fingerprint, dash-separated as observed during the TCP handshake (e.g. 2-4-8-1-3).

tcp-window-scale.description: TCP Window Scale factor component of the MuonFP fingerprint.

tcp-window-size.description: TCP Window Size component of the MuonFP fingerprint.

description: MuonFP is an open-source TCP fingerprinting standard built from TCP SYN/SYN-ACK packet attributes (TCP Window Size, ordered TCP Options KIND list, TCP MSS and TCP Window Scale), inspired by p0f. The fingerprint is expressed as 'TCPWindowSize:TCPOptions:TCPMSS:TCPWindowScale'. https://github.com/sundruid/muonfp
name: muonfp
